task.title: How to Unclog a Sink Using Drain Cleaner?
task.shortdesc: Quick and easy method of fixing a clogged sink, but requires purchasing the solution.

taskbody.context:
As a last choice method that is more direct, using drain cleaner solution can help break down debris such as hair clumps quickly. However, this should be the last method that is used as it contains strong chemicals that may affect the pipes.
Materials Needed:Drano Max Gel Clog Remover 32 ozPot / Kettle of Hot Water

step.cmd: Open the Drano and pour about 1/5 of the solution directly into the drain.
Wait for about 15 minutes. In the meantime, go heat up a pot / kettle of hot water.
When 15 minutes is finished, take the hot water and pour into the drain.

taskbody.result: Your drain should be rid of its debris now and be able to work normally.
